title: OData Response Formats
description: JSON Schema definitions for OData v4.01 response formats including entity collections, individual entities, error responses, delta responses, and service documents.

ServiceDocument.title: OData Service Document
ServiceDocument.description: The service document lists all top-level resources (entity sets, singletons, function imports) available from an OData service.

@odata.context.description: Context URL referencing the metadata document

EntityCollection.title: OData Entity Collection
EntityCollection.description: A collection of entities returned from an entity set query. Supports server-driven paging via nextLink and change tracking via deltaLink.

@odata.context.description: Context URL describing the collection type

@odata.count.description: Total count of entities matching the query (returned when $count=true)

@odata.nextLink.description: URL to retrieve the next page of results in server-driven paging

@odata.deltaLink.description: URL to retrieve changes since this response was generated

Entity.title: OData Entity
Entity.description: An individual entity instance with OData control information annotations and dynamic properties.

@odata.type.description: Fully qualified type name prefixed with #

@odata.id.description: Entity ID, typically a canonical URL

@odata.mediaReadLink.description: URL to read the media content of a media entity

@odata.mediaEditLink.description: URL to update the media content of a media entity

@odata.mediaContentType.description: MIME type of the media content

ODataError.title: OData Error Response
ODataError.description: Standard OData error response format per the OData JSON Format specification.

code.description: Service-defined error code (not the HTTP status code)

target.description: The target of the error, such as the name of the property in error

details.description: Array of additional error detail objects

innererror.description: Implementation-specific debug information to help determine the cause of the error

DeltaResponse.title: OData Delta Response
DeltaResponse.description: A delta response contains changes (created, updated, deleted entities and added/removed links) since a previous query.

DeletedEntity.title: Deleted Entity
DeletedEntity.description: Represents an entity that has been deleted or has fallen out of scope.

@odata.id.description: Entity ID of the deleted entity

reason.description: Reason the entity is no longer in the result set

AddedLink.title: Added Link
AddedLink.description: Represents a new relationship between two entities.

source.description: Entity ID of the source entity

target.description: Entity ID of the target entity

DeletedLink.title: Deleted Link
DeletedLink.description: Represents a removed relationship between two entities.

PrimitiveValue.title: Primitive Value Response
PrimitiveValue.description: Response containing a single primitive value.

EntityReference.title: Entity Reference
EntityReference.description: A reference to an entity (used in $ref responses).
